extraction.one_line_summary: MYLETSKYY Jakob won Stage 3 bunch sprint for his 12th career Tour de Pologne stage win, outsprinting PADALKO and MARINI.
tactical_patterns: MYLETSKYY dominated Tour de Pologne historically with 7 wins in single early edition, revealing consistent form at this race.
Teams Winner and United Healthcare attacked on flat terrain unsuccessfully, suggesting poor tactical judgment on inappropriate terrain.
Japanese rider worked specifically for sprint train control, indicating Asian continental teams developing leadout sophistication.

rider_signals.MYLETSKYY Jakob: positive: 12th career stage win at Tour de Pologne shows exceptional race-specific form and familiarity
rider_signals.MARINI Nicolas: neutral: hunting contract pressure but relaxed demeanor, prioritizing stage win over GC jersey
rider_signals.PADALKO: negative: visibly frustrated punching handlebars after third place, suggesting expectations exceeded capabilities
rider_signals.BEN HILL: positive: consistently infiltrating all breakaways and collecting bonus sprints, maximizing GC opportunities on non-climbing terrain
